heading: Who are we building for?

types.title: The Curious
types.question: Do you ask why and how, more than what?

types.title: The Expressive
types.question: Do you use music, fashion and memes to introduce yourself?

types.title: The Culturally Fluid
types.question: Do you live with contradictions — and are OK with it?

types.title: The (Mis)fit
types.question: For every square hole, round peg. Are you tired of one-size-fits-all narratives?
